CodeBlockMethod.Name: coin_count
CodeBlockMethod.Code: local coin_count = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/UIGroup/Inventory/InventoryPanel/CoinPanel/coin_count") local userCoin = tostring(self.Coin) coin_count.TextComponent.Text = userCoin log(self.Coin)

CodeBlockMethod.Name: save_coin
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local userId = self.Entity.PlayerComponent.UserId local userDataStorage = _DataStorageService:GetUserDataStorage(userId) local coinString = tostring(self.Coin)
userDataStorage:SetAsync("userCoin", coinString, function(errorCode, key) if errorCode == 0 then log("재화 저장 성공"..key) else log("재화 저장 실패"..tostring(errorCode)) end end)

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnBeginPlay
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local userId = self.Entity.PlayerComponent.UserId local userDataStorage = _DataStorageService:GetUserDataStorage(userId) local errorCode, coinString = userDataStorage:GetAndWait("userCoin")
if errorCode == 0 then if _UtilLogic:IsNilorEmptyString(coinString) == false then self.Coin = tonumber(coinString) end log("재화 로드 완료" .. tostring(self.Coin)) else log("재화 로드 실패") end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnSyncProperty
CodeBlockMethod.Code: if name == "Coin" then log("클라이언트 Coin 동기화 감지" .. tostring(value)) local coin_count = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/UIGroup/Inventory/InventoryPanel/CoinPanel/coin_count") if coin_count ~= nil then coin_count.TextComponent.Text = tostring(value) end end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity
TriggerBodyEntity:Destroy() self.Coin = self.Coin + 1 local soundRUID = "09242349927c4244a18da8276a37bbd4" _SoundService:PlaySound(soundRUID, 0.5)
self:coin_count() self:save_coin() log("코인점수: "..self.Coin)
